strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience spanning web, mobile, and embedded
Direct TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB experience matching the primary stack
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at re:cinq
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java experience appears dated (2016-2018)
Cloud/Kubernetes exposure mentioned only briefly without depth on AWS/GCP/Azure

key_factors.factor: Depth of full-stack experience with TS/Node/React
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling work

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer well above the 6+ year bar, with strong TypeScript/Node/React/MongoDB experience and directly relevant recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a rare and valuable match for this role. Gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, and modern cloud/Kubernetes depth exist but are easily bridgeable given the demonstrated breadth, polyglot background, and craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
